allow: Bash(curl -s -u bruce:bruce -H "Accept: application/vnd.api+json" "http://drupal.docker.localhost:88/jsonapi/node/article?page[limit]=3&sort=-created&fields[node--article]=title,status,created" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | grep -E '"title"|"status"|"created"|"id"' | head -20)
Bash(curl -sv -u bruce:bruce -H "Accept: application/vnd.api+json" "http://drupal.docker.localhost:88/jsonapi/node/article?page[limit]=3" 2>&1 | grep -E "< HTTP|Authorization|> GET")
